name: Kigai
description:
Its too unnerving when you got 250 pounds hauling right towards ya! Hopefully Kigai will find someone else to bother.

**I really recommend you roleplay to as a character listed in the scenario!! Obviously you may have to do some research on the Sharkco Roblox wiki to be accurate with details that could be included in your system prompts!**
creator: TheNarrator
